title: Praxelis sanctopaulensis
taxonomy: Praxelis sanctopaulensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America and is often classified within the subfamily Vernonioideae. Praxelis sanctopaulensis is closely related to other species in the Praxelis genus, which also includes P. cayapensis and P. rufa. The plant is characterized by its hairy leaves and small, yellow flowers. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Praxelis sanctopaulensis has a complex classification with multiple ranks.
